mapper.select: SELECT USERID AS username, EMAIL AS email, FIRSTNAME AS firstName, LASTNAME AS lastName, STATUS AS status, ADDR1 AS address1, ADDR2 AS address2, CITY AS city, STATE AS state, ZIP AS zip, COUNTRY AS country, PHONE AS phone, FAVCATEGORY AS favoriteCategoryId, LANGPREF AS languagePreference, MYLISTOPT AS listOption, BANNEROPT AS bannerOption, PASSWORD AS password FROM ACCOUNT WHERE USERID = #{username}

SELECT USERID AS username, EMAIL AS email, FIRSTNAME AS firstName, LASTNAME AS lastName, STATUS AS status, ADDR1 AS address1, ADDR2 AS address2, CITY AS city, STATE AS state, ZIP AS zip, COUNTRY AS country, PHONE AS phone, FAVCATEGORY AS favoriteCategoryId, LANGPREF AS languagePreference, MYLISTOPT AS listOption, BANNEROPT AS bannerOption, PASSWORD AS password FROM ACCOUNT WHERE USERID = #{username} AND PASSWORD = #{password}
mapper.update: UPDATE ACCOUNT SET EMAIL = #{email}, FIRSTNAME = #{firstName}, LASTNAME = #{lastName}, ADDR1 = #{address1}, ADDR2 = #{address2}, CITY = #{city}, STATE = #{state}, ZIP = #{zip}, COUNTRY = #{country}, PHONE = #{phone}, FAVCATEGORY = #{favoriteCategoryId}, LANGPREF = #{languagePreference}, MYLISTOPT = #{listOption}, BANNEROPT = #{bannerOption} WHERE USERID = #{username}
